Instance Property# userPassword

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+visionOS 2.0+watchOS 11.0+

```
var userPassword: LAEnvironment.MechanismUserPassword? { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/localauthentication/laenvironment/state-swift.class/userpassword#discussion)

Information about local user password (on macOS) or passcode (on embedded platforms).

@c nil if user password or passcode is not supported by this device.
